coordinate_contract.alignment: Translation applied to the current frame to align it with the previous frame.
coordinate_contract.x: positive moves the current image right
coordinate_contract.y: positive moves the current image down
coordinate_contract.rerender_use: Use normalized x/y only as a 2D background-compensation/reference curve; do not interpret as calibrated camera position or focal length.

solver.method: grayscale whole-frame phase correlation with Hann window
solver.confidence_rule: peak_to_mean_ratio >= 8; transition contamination when scene score >= 3.5 or YDIF >= 9.0

limitations: Whole-frame apparent motion mixes camera movement, character/environment animation, parallax, reframing, and generated-frame deformation.
Rotation, zoom, focal length, depth, and 3D camera transforms are not solved and remain null.
